MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT POLANCO, GLENDA ESPERANZA MARTINEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
